examples: Musicality, which is hard to define, is a major issue.
I happen to be a musical person, and writing prose always has to do with musicality.
Li-Wei drew the audience in with his artistry, his brilliant virtuosity and his very refined musicality and sincerity of interpretation.
Most recent movie musicals have tried to disguise their musicality, as if they find it slightly embarrassing that characters keep breaking into song.
But that's my job, because the orchestra wants clarity and musicality.
